diff:
diff --git a/src/parsers.py b/src/parsers.py
index 5094f17..496b1d1 100644
--- a/src/parsers.py
+++ b/src/parsers.py
@@ -1,11 +1,12 @@
 def parse_bool(value: str) -> bool:
-    if value == "true":
+    """Parse a boolean string, case-insensitive, trimming whitespace."""
+    v = value.strip().lower()
+    if v == "true":
         return True
-    if value == "false":
+    if v == "false":
         return False
     raise ValueError(f"invalid boolean: {value}")
 
-
 def parse_optional_int(value: str | None) -> int | None:
     if value is None or value == "":
         return None
diff --git a/src/settings.py b/src/settings.py
index d76295c..12a4034 100644
--- a/src/settings.py
+++ b/src/settings.py
@@ -1,16 +1,17 @@
-from src.parsers import parse_optional_int
+from src.parsers import parse_optional_int, parse_bool
 
 DEFAULTS = {"debug": False, "port": 8000, "timeout": 30}
 
-
 def load_settings(env: dict[str, str]) -> dict[str, object]:
     settings = DEFAULTS.copy()
     if "APP_PORT" in env:
-        parsed_port = parse_optional_int(env["APP_PORT"])
+        parsed_port = parse_optional_int(env["APP_PORT"].strip())
         if parsed_port is not None:
             settings["port"] = parsed_port
     if "APP_TIMEOUT" in env:
-        settings["timeout"] = env["APP_TIMEOUT"]
+        parsed_timeout = parse_optional_int(env["APP_TIMEOUT"].strip())
+        if parsed_timeout is not None:
+            settings["timeout"] = parsed_timeout
     if "APP_DEBUG" in env:
-        settings["debug"] = env["APP_DEBUG"] == "true"
+        settings["debug"] = parse_bool(env["APP_DEBUG"].strip())
     return settings
